expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly frames the focus and separation: “modern-grid hyperlink-style coverage that separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering” and further states the benchmark requires distinguishing “contextual links applied to grid cells … vs ordinary grid element rendering”. It also cites fixture language about “blue/underlined hyperlink styling with an indicator icon,” which directly targets contextual-link styling distinct from baseline rendering.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md confirms “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a” and result.md section “Output alignment with Phase 4a deliverable” ties expected artifacts/validation to Phase 4a: “Phase 4a output: drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r<round>.md” and references SKILL.md/reference.md for Phase 4a spawn+post-validate behavior.
